LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - LATE NOTICE WAS GIVEN TO THE OTHER PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT JAMES ALVEY'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND WRIT OF EXECUTION IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO ATTACH A PROPOSED RESPONSIVE PLEADING AS REQUIRED BY C C P SECTION 473 (B).
